channel.title: 音楽ニュースリスト - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: 音楽ニュースサイトの発信をまとめて確認するためのリスト

item.title: Playing at altitude with the passionate backing of 80,824 fa…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Playing at altitude with the passionate backing of 80,824 fans at Estadio Azteca, and with a man advantage for most of the second half, Mexico scored twice but could never equalize and lost 3-2. n.pr/3T2USzf
item.content:encoded: Playing at altitude with the passionate backing of 80,824 fans at Estadio Azteca, and with a man advantage for most of the second half, Mexico scored twice but could never equalize and lost 3-2. n.pr/3T2USzf

item.title: 【ライブレポート】 超ときめき♡宣伝部の全国ツアーが開幕！ 新シングル曲「大盛りハッピー」初披露 「悔いが残ら…
item.author: 音楽ナタリー (@music.natalie.mu)
item.description:
【ライブレポート】
超ときめき♡宣伝部の全国ツアーが開幕！
新シングル曲「大盛りハッピー」初披露

「悔いが残らないように
　全力で活動していきたい」

👇️記事はこちら（写真15枚）
https://natalie.mu/music/news/679345?utm_source=bluesky&utm_medium=social

　全力で活動していきたい」

item.title: 【今日の夕方】 AND2BLE、フリーライブ開催を発表 新宿 歌舞伎町タワー前、本日18時頃スタート予定 http…
item.author: 音楽ナタリー (@music.natalie.mu)
item.description:
【今日の夕方】
AND2BLE、フリーライブ開催を発表
新宿 歌舞伎町タワー前、本日18時頃スタート予定
https://natalie.mu/music/news/679489?utm_source=bluesky&utm_medium=social

AND2BLEは元ZEROBASEONEメンバー4人と元EVNNEメンバー1人からなるボーイズグループ。今年5月にデビューし、今週末には初の兵庫公演の開催を控える。
item.content:encoded:
【今日の夕方】
AND2BLE、フリーライブ開催を発表
新宿 歌舞伎町タワー前、本日18時頃スタート予定
https://natalie.mu/music/news/679489?utm_source=bluesky&utm_medium=social

AND2BLEは元ZEROBASEONEメンバー4人と元EVNNEメンバー1人からなるボーイズグループ。今年5月にデビューし、今週末には初の兵庫公演の開催を控える。

item.title: President Trump has made substantial efforts to curb renewab…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: President Trump has made substantial efforts to curb renewable energy development. The Ute Mountain Ute tribe in Colorado managed to bring a big solar project online anyway. n.pr/4y6lek6
item.content:encoded: President Trump has made substantial efforts to curb renewable energy development. The Ute Mountain Ute tribe in Colorado managed to bring a big solar project online anyway. n.pr/4y6lek6

item.description:
／
　夏焼雅が総合プロデュース
　アイドルオーディション開催決定🎸
＼　

コンセプトは“7人組アイドル×ROCKグループ”
「一緒に、誰にも真似できない
最強のグループを作りましょう」

👇詳細はこちら

item.title: We’ve officially made it halfway through 2026; with that in …
item.author: Record Club (@record.club)
item.description:
We’ve officially made it halfway through 2026; with that in mind, the Record Club team wanted to take a look at the highest rated albums of the year as decided by you!

For a more inclusive list of the highest rated releases of the year, head to record.club today and join the conversation.
item.content:encoded:
We’ve officially made it halfway through 2026; with that in mind, the Record Club team wanted to take a look at the highest rated albums of the year as decided by you!

For a more inclusive list of the highest rated releases of the year, head to record.club today and join the conversation.

item.title: 谷山浩子がニューアルバム発表 2010年代の楽曲群より16曲を厳選 https://natalie.mu/music…
item.author: 音楽ナタリー (@music.natalie.mu)
item.description:
谷山浩子がニューアルバム発表
2010年代の楽曲群より16曲を厳選
https://natalie.mu/music/news/679452?utm_source=bluesky&utm_medium=social

item.title: Prog never stands still. This month's Prog Is a State of Min…
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: Prog never stands still. This month's Prog Is a State of Mind celebrates the legacy of Dave Greenslade, spotlights adventurous new releases, and proves there's always another corner of prog to explore.
item.content:encoded: Prog never stands still. This month's Prog Is a State of Mind celebrates the legacy of Dave Greenslade, spotlights adventurous new releases, and proves there's always another corner of prog to explore.

item.title: Memphis police say National Guard troops fired their weapons…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Memphis police say National Guard troops fired their weapons in the early morning hours of July 5, killing a man who was armed with a handgun. State investigators will handle the case. n.pr/4aAUCgW
item.content:encoded: Memphis police say National Guard troops fired their weapons in the early morning hours of July 5, killing a man who was armed with a handgun. State investigators will handle the case. n.pr/4aAUCgW

item.title: The Second Continental Congress produced the Declaration of …
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The Second Continental Congress produced the Declaration of Independence 250 years ago, and its legacy can be seen in the Congress we know today. But are lawmakers living up to the founders' ideals?
item.content:encoded: The Second Continental Congress produced the Declaration of Independence 250 years ago, and its legacy can be seen in the Congress we know today. But are lawmakers living up to the founders' ideals?

item.title: Thunderstorms with high winds could make it more difficult t…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Thunderstorms with high winds could make it more difficult to contain a massive wildfire that has scorched parts of southern Colorado. n.pr/4eUA6cp
item.content:encoded: Thunderstorms with high winds could make it more difficult to contain a massive wildfire that has scorched parts of southern Colorado. n.pr/4eUA6cp

item.title: Jazz Left Behind By Streaming. The stream-scape is miles wid…
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: Jazz Left Behind By Streaming. The stream-scape is miles wide and maybe—maybe—a tiny fraction of an inch deep. You can find jazz on the streamers, but records and artists at the margins of what is already a niche genre tend to be neglected.
item.content:encoded: Jazz Left Behind By Streaming. The stream-scape is miles wide and maybe—maybe—a tiny fraction of an inch deep. You can find jazz on the streamers, but records and artists at the margins of what is already a niche genre tend to be neglected.

item.title: FIFA's Disciplinary Committee said it would suspend Balogun'…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: FIFA's Disciplinary Committee said it would suspend Balogun's one-game red card ban for a probationary period of one year. The Royal Belgian Football Federation said it was "astonished."
item.content:encoded: FIFA's Disciplinary Committee said it would suspend Balogun's one-game red card ban for a probationary period of one year. The Royal Belgian Football Federation said it was "astonished."

item.title: As much of the Eastern U.S. experiences potentially record-b…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: As much of the Eastern U.S. experiences potentially record-breaking daytime temperatures, the nights are also staying unusually warm, leaving the human body no time to recover.
item.content:encoded: As much of the Eastern U.S. experiences potentially record-breaking daytime temperatures, the nights are also staying unusually warm, leaving the human body no time to recover.

item.title: Memphis police say National Guard troops fired their weapons…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Memphis police say National Guard troops fired their weapons in the early morning hours of July 5th, killing a man who was armed with a handgun. State investigators will handle the case.
item.content:encoded: Memphis police say National Guard troops fired their weapons in the early morning hours of July 5th, killing a man who was armed with a handgun. State investigators will handle the case.

item.title: Every month, Ted Davis scours the cerebral fringes of Bandca…
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: Every month, Ted Davis scours the cerebral fringes of Bandcamp. This column adopts a fluid approach—anything deemed worthy of the genre tag is considered eligible. The Best Ambient Music on Bandcamp, June 2026.
item.content:encoded: Every month, Ted Davis scours the cerebral fringes of Bandcamp. This column adopts a fluid approach—anything deemed worthy of the genre tag is considered eligible. The Best Ambient Music on Bandcamp, June 2026.
